files.side_effect_scope: injected in-memory cache only when enabled

implemented_invariants: disabled policy returns before checkpoint, cache, or evaluator access
enabled v1 policy values cannot tune frozen candidate counts, threshold, profile size, or retries
2-4 feasible unique frozen candidates are sorted by code hash
full symmetric item-placement budget is checked before cache or evaluator access
complete and failed exact-key diagnostics are cached in memory and reused without retry
every cache miss is attempted once even after another coordinate fails
ranking flips are computed by one checkpoint-owned OrderRegimeRankingTracker
scientific outcome identity excludes runtime and cache hit/miss but includes coordinate failures
projection preserves source_actor and labels created memory as development_diagnostic_only
failed coordinates never create archive candidates, memories, or prompt summaries
prompt summaries are fixed-template, bounded, metadata-only records
implementation.necessary_contract_clarification: OrderRegimeCandidateDiagnostic carries source_actor copied by the coordinator from FrozenDiagnosticCandidate. This is required for the one-argument projector Interface to preserve historical_eoh versus research_agent attribution without reading external state.

initial_scan_false_positives: The first scanner treated an Interface method named compile as Python's compile builtin.
The first two path scans treated the security regex pattern itself as a concrete home path.
The final AST parent-aware scanner excluded regex pattern constants and explicitly checked the Python exit code.

unchanged_paths: FME v2 proposal and all cohort state
suggested_tests_not_run: disabled policy causes zero evaluator and cache calls
insufficient budget skips before dependency access
complete two-candidate checkpoint has deterministic outcome and projection hashes
one evaluator failure preserves all remaining coordinates and returns inconclusive
failed cache entry is reused without retry
malformed cache, candidate, summary, scope, or identity raises a stable contract error
projection contains no raw code, item sequence, held-out value, path, provider field, or secret
